# Joystick

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Joystick icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="Joystick" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M21 17a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v2a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-2Z&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M6 15v-2&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;path d=&quot;M12 15V9&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;circle cx=&quot;12&quot; cy=&quot;6&quot; r=&quot;3&quot;&gt;&lt;/circle&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" data-di-preview="true" aria-label="Joystick preview"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Joystick icon"></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Size</span><input data-di-size="true" type="number" min="1" max="256" value="24"></label><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Color</span><input data-di-color="true" type="color" value="#000000"></label><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Stroke</span><input data-di-stroke="true" type="number" min="1" max="12" value="2"></label></div></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-output"><pre class="dioxus-icons-widget-code dxc dxc-system dxc-system-light-github-light dxc-system-dark-github-dark" data-language="rust"><code data-di-code="true"><span class="a-t">Joystick</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">{</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">size</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">24</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">color</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
game, console, control stick

## Categories
gaming, devices

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/joystick)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Joystick;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Joystick { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
